title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.029.0) Update
description:
Software 6.A.029.0 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Other improvements
  • An option to change the order of buttons on the navigation bar has been added to the Settings.
  • Security patch level: 5th of June, 2024

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.
